justification: Boundaries correct: 10 is heavy (weight < 10 excludes 10), 50 is freight (weight < 50 excludes 50). All 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external dependencies. No features beyond spec. Confidence level 99 >= 85. files_changed lists both implementation and test files with purpose.

observations.text: Boundary logic is correct: sequential threshold checks (< 10, < 50) naturally place 10 in heavy and 50 in freight
All 5 acceptance criteria mapped 1-to-1 to named tests with clear notes explaining the logic
Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) go beyond minimum requirements without adding unspecified features
No external dependencies — pure TypeScript with Jest only
No deviations or unrequested features added
Assumptions about upper bound (1000) and fractional weights are reasonable and documented
